data.title: $100 Invested In Morgan Stanley 15 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today
data.description:
Morgan Stanley (NYSE:MS) has outperformed the market over the past 15 years by 2.42% on an annualized basis producing an average annual return of 14.09%. Currently, Morgan Stanley has a market capitalization of $295.98 billion.

Buying $100 In MS: If an investor had bought $100 of MS stock 15 years ago, it would be worth $719.20 today based on a price of $187.33 for MS at the time of writing.

Finally -- what's the point of all this? The key insight to take from this article is to note how much of a difference compounded returns can make in your cash growth over a period of time.
